cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the movies. The problem gives us a set of times when Leslie was seen doing different activities by different people, and we need to find a time window when Leslie wasn't accounted for, but also before the movies closed at 7pm. First, let's list out all the known activities: 1. Leslie woke up at 6am. So that's the starting point. 2. Susan saw Leslie on a rooftop from 6am to 7am. So Leslie was on the rooftop during that hour. 3. Mary saw Leslie working at the office from 12pm to 2pm. So Leslie was at the office during that two-hour window. 4. Steven saw Leslie getting coffee at the cafe from 2pm to 7pm. So Leslie was at the cafe
